subject: Cloud Computing
title: Edge AI: Intelligence at the Source
description: A quick, practical guide to Edge AI: Intelligence at the Source.

hook.text: Your phone recognizes your face without calling the cloud. That's edge AI — running models locally on the device.

buildup.text: Edge AI uses compressed models (TinyML) that run on chips with minimal power. No internet required for inference.

discovery.text: Training happens in the cloud; inference happens on the edge. The cloud teaches, the device applies what it learned.

twist.text: Privacy improves too. If data never leaves the device, there's nothing to breach. Edge AI keeps your data at home.

climax.text: Apple's Neural Engine, Google's Edge TPU, and NVIDIA Jetson prove that AI at the edge is already mainstream.

punchline.text: AI on your device. No cloud call. Private and instant.

quiz.question: What is a key privacy benefit of edge AI?
options: Data never leaves the device, so there's nothing to breach in transit
Edge AI encrypts all data before sending it to the cloud
Edge AI deletes all data after processing it in the cloud
